modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Security camera image is fuzzy and out of focus.

full_description_text: The user reported that the Axis security camera is very fuzzy. They asked if it is possible to clean the lens or refocus the camera. The issue was discussed during a live phone call with the help desk analyst.
short_description: Security camera image is fuzzy and out of focus.
description: The user reported that the Axis security camera is very fuzzy. They asked if it is possible to clean the lens or refocus the camera. The issue was discussed during a live phone call with the help desk analyst.
